title: Working Out | #shorts
full_text: Mom, it's January 2nd and I really think we should go to the gym today. >> No. Why would we go to the gym? >> You told me one of your resolutions was to work out more. >> I do. I do. But I'm working my way to the working out. >> Okay. But the first you said that you had to get a massage, >> right? I did. And you know, I needed it. >> Today you have not. >> I said after I get the massage, let's see how the weather shapes out cuz yesterday was >> the gym is indoors. >> Okay. Everything's so technical with you. This body was designed to live near the equator in the sun. Now >> you live IN NEW YORK. YOU LIVE IN NEW YORK. >> YOUR vitamin D deficiency is so bad that THE DOCTOR KEEPS TELLING ME TO GO get more vitamin D supplements for you that you throw away immediately. >> Your dad forced me to come and live here in this arctic tundra. >> Arctic tundra. >> Not only of temperature but also of human emotions because look how my kids are talking to me.
